description_long: This is a vintage-style biplane with a distinctive red and yellow color scheme, featuring two sets of straight, parallel wings supported by vertical struts. The fuselage is rounded and tapers toward the tail, with a single open cockpit positioned just behind the upper wing. The nose houses a visible radial piston engine with a propeller, and the landing gear consists of two main wheels and a small tail skid. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and a horizontal stabilizer, both with rounded edges. The overall design evokes early 20th-century aircraft, with exposed structural elements and a compact, lightweight appearance.
description: A red and yellow vintage biplane with dual wings, open cockpit, radial engine, and fixed landing gear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the radial engine, propeller hub, dual main wheels, and the stacked biplane wings.
description_view_1: Angled top-side view highlighting the upper wing's surface, cockpit placement, and the tail's rounded design.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail assembly, horizontal and vertical stabilizers, and the full wingspan.
description_view_3: Opposite angled top-side view emphasizing the upper wing, cockpit, and the curvature of the fuselage and tail.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Biplane configuration with two sets of straight, parallel wings mounted one above the other, supported by vertical struts; no winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted radial piston engine with visible propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers; rounded edges.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a tail skid.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Open single-seat cockpit located just behind the upper wing, forward-mounted on the fuselage.
